title: polygala glaziowii
intro: Polygala glaziowii, also known as Yin Yang Huo, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Polygala glaziowii include improving kidney function, enhancing immune system, and treating respiratory diseases. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
